trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025‑06‑24 laboratory tests recommend DE CECCO and DE RICA as top passata brands, noting their quality, absence of added water, and competitive pricing. The evidence is older than 60 days.
